summary: Asian markets continue to assess the impact of escalating US-Iran tensions. Major indices saw declines on Monday, with continuing volatility on Tuesday. Global commodities, particularly oil, show instability. The Boao Forum for Asia 2026 has commenced in Hainan, China.
key_events: US-Iran geopolitical tensions weighing on investor sentiment
Boao Forum for Asia 2026 begins in Hainan, China
Oil prices exhibit volatility; Brent at ~$112, WTI reacting to geopolitical uncertainty
